relationships: ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel ur tesεi ara aṭas n teɣbula tigamanin
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel, yellan deg Lezzayer, d tamnaḍt tahuskayt
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel, yellan deg Lezzayer, d tamnaḍt tucbiḥt
ber:Tamurt n Yizwawen tella d tahuskayt imir-nni
ber:D iseggasen aya seg wasmi ur ẓriɣ Tamurt n Leqbayel
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel, deg Zzayer, amur ameqqran seg-s d adraran
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel tesεa aṭas n yiɣerman ihuskayen
ber:Tamurt n Yizwawen ɣer-s iɣerman d ihuskayen
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel, yellan deg Lezzayer, d tamnaḍt icebḥen
ber:Ma ur tḥemmled ara Tamurt n Yizwawen, ffeɣ seg-s!
